# API Keys Setup

Set these environment variables in Windows System Settings or your shell profile.

## Required

| Variable | Source | Used By |
|----------|--------|---------|
| `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` | console.anthropic.com | claude-advanced-tools |

## Optional (enable more features)

| Variable | Source | Used By |
|----------|--------|---------|
| `OPENAI_API_KEY` | platform.openai.com | hooks-mastery TTS + LLM fallback |
| `ELEVENLABS_API_KEY` | elevenlabs.io | hooks-mastery TTS (best quality) |
| `BLINDORACLE_API_KEY` | craigmbrown.com/blindoracle | blindoracle-client |
| `BLINDORACLE_API_URL` | `https://api.craigmbrown.com/a2a` | blindoracle-client |
| `BLINDORACLE_AGENT_NAME` | your choice | blindoracle-client |
| `ENGINEER_NAME` | your name | hooks-mastery personalization |
| `BLINDORACLE_HUB_PRIVKEY` | nostr nsec key | agent passport Schnorr signing |

## How to set on Windows (permanent)

```
! setx ANTHROPIC_API_KEY "sk-ant-..."
! setx ENGINEER_NAME "Noah"
! setx BLINDORACLE_API_URL "https://api.craigmbrown.com/a2a"
```

Or set them in Windows > System > Environment Variables GUI.

I found comprehensive information about Claude Code's 2026 release notes and changelog. Here's a summary of the major updates:

## Key 2026 Claude Code Updates

The changelog documents Claude Code's version history through March 2026, with an intensive iteration cycle between March and April 2026, pushing from v2.1.69 to v2.1.101 in just five weeksâ€”that's over 30 releases.

### Major Features Released

**Model & Effort Updates:**
Claude Opus 4.7 xhigh is now available with an xhigh effort level sitting between high and max. Auto mode is now available for Max subscribers when using Opus 4.7.

**Computer Use & Automation:**
On March 23, Anthropic added computer use to Claude Code and Cowork for Pro and Max users, letting Claude open files, run dev tools, point, click, and navigate the screen with no setup required.

**New Tools & Commands:**
Web teleport - Claude Code Web: Support for Web -> CLI teleport, Sandbox mode - Releasing sandbox mode for BashTool on Linux & Mac, and Interactive questions - Added interactive question tool for better user interaction. Ultraplan enters early preview: draft a plan in the cloud from your CLI, review and comment on it in a web editor, then run it remotely or pull it back local.

**Plugin System:**
Plugin System Released - Extend Claude Code with custom commands, agents, hooks, and MCP servers from marketplaces.

**Additional Improvements:**
Added /ultrareview for running comprehensive code review in the cloud using parallel multi-agent analysis and critique.

For the complete and most up-to-date release notes, run claude --version in your terminal.

# What's new

> A weekly digest of notable Claude Code features, with code snippets, demos, and context on why they matter.

The weekly dev digest highlights the features most likely to change how you work. Each entry includes runnable code, a short demo, and a link to the full docs. For every bug fix and minor improvement, see the [changelog](/en/changelog).

<Update label="Week 15" description="April 6â€“10, 2026" tags={["v2.1.92â€“v2.1.101"]}>
  **Ultraplan** enters early preview: draft a plan in the cloud from your CLI, review and comment on it in a web editor, then run it remotely or pull it back local. The first run now auto-creates a cloud environment for you.

  Also this week: the **Monitor** tool streams background events into the conversation so Claude can tail logs and react live, `/loop` self-paces when you omit the interval, `/team-onboarding` packages your setup into a replayable guide, and `/autofix-pr` turns on PR auto-fix from your terminal.

  [Read the Week 15 digest â†’](/en/whats-new/2026-w15)
</Update>

<Update label="Week 14" description="March 30 â€“ April 3, 2026" tags={["v2.1.86â€“v2.1.91"]}>
  **Computer use** comes to the CLI in research preview: Claude can open native apps, click through UI, and verify changes from your terminal. Best for closing the loop on things only a GUI can verify.

  Also this week: `/powerup` interactive lessons, flicker-free alt-screen rendering, a per-tool MCP result-size override up to 500K, and plugin executables on the Bash tool's `PATH`.

  [Read the Week 14 digest â†’](/en/whats-new/2026-w14)
</Update>

<Update label="Week 13" description="March 23â€“27, 2026" tags={["v2.1.83â€“v2.1.85"]}>
  **Auto mode** lands in research preview: a classifier handles your permission prompts so safe actions run without interruption and risky ones get blocked. The middle ground between approving everything and `--dangerously-skip-permissions`.

# Claude Code Latest Features & Changes Summary

## Recent Major Features (v2.1.111 - v2.1.112)

### Model & Performance
- **Claude Opus 4.7 xhigh** - New effort level between `high` and `max` via `/effort`
- **Auto mode** - Now available for Max subscribers with Opus 4.7
- **`/effort` interactive slider** - Arrow-key navigation and Enter to confirm

### Code Review & Analysis
- **`/ultrareview`** - Comprehensive cloud-based code review using parallel multi-agent analysis
  - `/ultrareview` (current branch) or `/ultrareview <PR#>` (specific GitHub PR)
- **`/less-permission-prompts`** skill - Scans transcripts and proposes bash/MCP allowlist

### UI & Theme
- **"Auto (match terminal)" theme** - Automatically matches terminal dark/light mode via `/theme`
- **PowerShell tool** - Progressive Windows rollout; opt in/out with `CLAUDE_CODE_USE_POWERSHELL_TOOL`
- **Plan file naming** - Now named after prompts (e.g., `fix-auth-race-snug-otter.md`)

### Bash Tool Improvements
- Read-only commands with glob patterns (`ls *.ts`) no longer trigger prompts
- Commands starting with `cd <project-dir> &&` skip permission prompts
- `Ctrl+U` now clears entire input buffer; `Ctrl+Y` restores
- `Ctrl+L` forces full screen redraw

### MCP & Connectivity
- **1-hour prompt cache TTL** - `ENABLE_PROMPT_CACHING_1H` env var (API key, Bedrock, Vertex, Foundry)
- **`OTEL_LOG_RAW_API_BODIES`** - Emit full API request/response bodies for debugging
- Improved plugin error handling with dependency conflict distinction

---

## Breaking Changes

### Command Changes
- `/undo` â†’ alias for `/rewind`
- `/vim` removed (toggle via `/config` â†’ Editor mode)
- `/tag` removed
- `/output-style` deprecated (use `/config` instead)
- Effort levels simplified: `low`/`medium`/`high` (removed `max`); use `/effort auto` to reset

### Settings & Permissions
- `cleanupPeriodDays: 0` now rejected with validation error (previously silent)
- `--plugin-dir` now accepts single path only; use repeated flags for multiple
- Removed Windows managed settings fallback at `C:\ProgramData\ClaudeCode\managed-settings.json`
- Bedrock default Opus model changed to **4.6** (from 4.1)

### Terminal & Rendering
- Line-by-line response streaming **disabled on Windows/WSL** (rendering issues)
- Thinking summaries no longer generated by default (set `showThinkingSummaries: true` to restore)
- `Ctrl+F` changed from "stop all background agents" to `Ctrl+X Ctrl+K` (readline forward-char conflict)

---

## New Settings & Configuration

### Environment Variables
```bash
# Prompt caching
ENABLE_PROMPT_CACHING_1H=1
ENABLE_PROMPT_CACHING_1H_BEDROCK=1  # deprecated
FORCE_PROMPT_CACHING_5M=1

# Logging & Debugging
OTEL_LOG_RAW_API_BODIES=1
CLAUDE_CODE_ENABLE_AWAY_SUMMARY=0  # disable recap feature

# Rendering
CLAUDE_CODE_NO_FLICKER=1  # opt into flicker-free alt-screen

# MCP & Plugins
CLAUDE_CODE_USE_MANTLE=1  # Bedrock powered by Mantle
CLAUDE_CODE_USE_POWERSHELL_TOOL=1  # PowerShell tool (Windows)
CLAUDE_CODE_PLUGIN_KEEP_MARKETPLACE_ON_FAILURE=1
CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_CRON=1

# Permissions & Security
CLAUDE_CODE_SUBPROCESS_ENV_SCRUB=1  # strip credentials from subprocesses
CLAUDE_CODE_PERFORCE_MODE=1  # `p4 edit` hint on read-only files
CLAUDE_CODE_SKIP_BEDROCK_AUTH=1

# Performance & Features
CLAUDE_CODE_NO_FLICKER=1  # virtualized scrollback
MCP_CONNECTION_NONBLOCKING=true  # `-p` mode: skip MCP wait
CLAUDE_CODE_SESSIONEND_HOOKS_TIMEOUT_MS=<milliseconds>
CLAUDE_STREAM_IDLE_TIMEOUT_MS=<milliseconds>  # default 90000
```

### Settings.json New Fields
```json
{
  "showThinkingSummaries": true,
  "disableSkillShellExecution": true,
  "autoMemoryDirectory": "/path/to/memory",
  "autoScrollEnabled": false,  // disable auto-scroll in fullscreen
  "showClearContextOnPlanAccept": false,
  "feedbackSurveyRate": 0.1,  // enterprise admins
  "refreshInterval": 30,  // status line re-run interval (seconds)
  "modelOverrides": {
    "Opus": "arn:aws:bedrock:..."  // custom model mappings
  },
  "worktree.sparsePaths": ["packages/web", "packages/cli"],
  "sandbox": {
    "failIfUnavailable": true,
    "network.allowMachLookup": true,  // macOS
    "filesystem.allowRead": ["/allowed/path"],  // re-allow within denyRead
    "filesystem.allowWrite": ["//absolute/path"]
  },
  "hooks": {
    "eventName": {
      "if": "Bash(git *)",  // conditional execution
      "...": "..."
    }
  },
  "disableDeepLinkRegistration": true
}
```

---

## New Hooks & Events

| Hook | Trigger | Usage |
|------|---------|-------|
| `TaskCreated` | Task created via `TaskCreate` | Block with exit code 2 or `{"decision":"block"}` |
| `PreCompact` | Before conversation compaction | Block compaction |
| `PostCompact` | After compaction completes | - |
| `CwdChanged` | Working directory changes | Reactive environment (e.g., direnv) |
| `FileChanged` | Tracked file modified | - |
| `PermissionDenied` | Auto mode classifier denial | Return `{retry: true}` to retry |
| `Elicitation` / `ElicitationResult` | MCP elicitation mid-task | Intercept structured input |
| `StopFailure` | Turn ends due to API error | Fire on rate limit, auth failure |
| `WorktreeCreate` (HTTP type) | Return via `hookSpecificOutput.worktreePath` |

**Conditional Hook Execution:**
```json
{
  "hooks": {
    "PreToolUse": {
      "if": "Bash(git *)",  // only runs for git commands
      "script": "..."
    }
  }
}
```

---

## New Slash Commands

| Command | Purpose |
|---------|---------|
| `/effort` | Interactive slider: low/medium/high (arrows + Enter) |
| `/tui` | Switch to flicker-free fullscreen rendering |
| `/tui fullscreen` | Explicitly enable fullscreen rendering |
| `/focus` | Toggle focus view (show only final response) |
| `/less-permission-prompts` | Scan & propose bash/MCP allowlist |
| `/ultrareview` | Cloud-based comprehensive code review |
| `/ultrareview <PR#>` | Review specific GitHub PR |
| `/powerup` | Interactive feature lessons with demos |
| `/team-onboarding` | Generate teammate ramp-up guide |
| `/btw` | Side question during response (improved) |
| `/color` | Set session prompt-bar color |
| `/plan <description>` | Start plan mode immediately |
| `/copy N` | Copy Nth-latest response |
| `/undo` | Alias for `/rewind` |
| `/recap` | Manually invoke recap feature |
| `/less-permission-prompts` | Auto-generate permission allowlist |

---

## New Permissions & Permission Rules

### Bash Auto-Allow Additions
- Read-only commands with **glob patterns**: `ls *.ts`, `find . -name "*.json"`
- **`cd <project-dir> &&` prefix**: Commands starting with cd into project stay read-only
- **Safe prefixes**: `LANG=C`, `NO_COLOR=1`, `timeout 5`, etc.
- **Added tools**: `lsof`, `pgrep`, `tput`, `ss`, `fd`, `fdfind`
- **Removed**: `Get-DnsClientCache`, `ipconfig /displaydns` (DNS privacy)

### New Permission Features
- **`defer` decision**: `PreToolUse` hooks can defer and resume with `-p --resume`
- **`PermissionDenied` hook**: Fires after auto mode denials; return `{retry: true}`
- **MCP tool elicitation**: Servers can request structured input via form dialogs
- **Conditional rules**: `if: "Bash(pattern)"` in hooks for targeted execution

```json
{
  "permissions": {
    "defaultMode": "auto",  // now validates correctly
    "deny": ["mcp__blocked_server"],  // fully blocks server tools
    "additionalDirectories": ["/project/src"],
    "allowedMcpServers": ["slack", "gmail"],
    "deniedMcpServers": ["untrusted"]
  }
}
```

---

## New MCP Server Features

- **MCP elicitation** - Servers request structured input mid-task via interactive dialogs
- **Protected Resource Metadata** (RFC 9728) - OAuth discovery for authorization servers
- **Large result persistence** - `_meta["anthropic/maxResultSizeChars"]` (up to 500KB)
- **Monitor tool** - Stream events from background scripts
- **Step-up authorization** - Servers can request elevated scopes via `403 insufficient_scope`
- **Connection environment vars**: `CLAUDE_CODE_MCP_SERVER_NAME`, `CLAUDE_CODE_MCP_SERVER_URL`
- **Plugin bin/ executables** - Plugins can ship binaries under `bin/` for Bash invocation

---

## IDE Integration Changes

### VS Code / VSCode Extensions
- **Session auto-titling** - AI-generated titles within seconds of first message
- **`/remote-control`** - Bridge session to claude.ai/code (web/mobile continuation)
- **Rate limit banner** - Shows usage % and reset time
- **Improved sidebar** - Session history loads correctly on reopen
- **`Esc` twice** - Open keyboard-navigable rewind picker
- **Thinking pill** - Shows "Thought for Ns" after response
- **Faster cold-open** - Reduced subprocess work

### CLI Deep Links
- **`claude-cli://open?q=<query>`** - Now supports up to 5,000 characters
- **Newlines** - `%0A` encoded newlines no longer rejected
- **Terminal-aware** - Opens in preferred terminal (not first available)

---

## Opt-In Features & Beta

### Flicker-Free Rendering
```bash
CLAUDE_CODE_NO_FLICKER=1  # alt-screen virtualized scrollback
```
Features:
- Flicker-free alt-screen rendering
- Focus view toggle (`Ctrl+O`): prompt + one-line tool summary + final response
- `NO_FLICKER` mode optimizations

### Extended Thinking (Enhanced)
- Rotating progress hint during extended thinking
- Thinking summaries disabled by default (opt-in via `showThinkingSummaries`)
- Adaptive thinking error handling

### Auto Mode Enhancements
- **Opus 4.7 support** - Auto mode available for Max subscribers
- **Notifications** - Denied commands show in `/permissions` â†’ Recent tab with `r` to retry
- **Boundary respect** - No longer bypasses explicit user directives
- **Sandbox network** - Auto-approves sandbox network access prompts
- **Safety classifier** - Fixed transcript context window overflow

### Remote Control (VSCode / Bridge)
- **Mobile/web continuation** - Continue session in browser or phone
- **Push notifications** - When enabled, Claude sends mobile notifications
- **Channel servers** - MCP servers can forward permission prompts to phone
- **`--channels`** - Research preview for message push from MCP servers

### Voice Mode Improvements
- **Push-to-talk** - Fixed modifier-combo bindings (e.g., `Ctrl+K`)
- **Automatic retry** - Transient connection failures retry automatically
- **CJK IME** - Full-width space no longer breaks hold-to-talk
- **Dictation language** - Shows language on enable, warns if unsupported
- **macOS native** - Audio input entitlement added

---

## Recent Bug Fixes & Hardening

### Security Hardening
- **Bash permission bypass** - Backslash-escaped flags no longer auto-allow
- **Compound commands** - Forced permission prompts no longer bypassable
- **Network redirects** - `/dev/tcp` and `/dev/udp` now prompt
- **PowerShell** - Trailing `&` background job bypass fixed
- **Command injection** - POSIX `which` fallback vulnerability patched
- **Windows drive roots** - Dangerous removal detection (e.g., `C:\Windows`)

### API & Provider Fixes
- **Bedrock SigV4** - Fixed 403 auth with `AWS_BEARER_TOKEN_BEDROCK`
- **Vertex AI** - Setup wizard now guides GCP auth, project, region, model pinning
- **Foundry** - Model fallback to Opus 4.6
- **429 rate limits** - Exponential backoff now applies as minimum
- **Streaming idle** - 5-minute timeout instead of indefinite hang
- **Non-streaming fallback** - Increased token cap (21k â†’ 64k) and timeout (120s â†’ 300s)

### Transcript & Session Management
- **`--resume` chain recovery** - Fixed dead-end branch anchoring on large sessions
- **Concurrent sessions** - Fixed OAuth token refresh requiring repeated re-auth
- **Worktree cleanup** - Stale worktree directory fully removed
- **Session recap** - Now enabled for telemetry-disabled users (Bedrock, Vertex)
- **Memory filenames** - Highlight on hover, open on click

---

## Performance Improvements

| Optimization | Impact |
|--------------|--------|
| Write tool diff computation | 60% faster on large files |
| Bash command parsing | Native module (faster init, no memory leak) |
| SSE transport | Large frames handled in linear time (was quadratic) |
| SDK transcript writes | No longer slow down quadratically |
| Bundle size | ~510 KB reduction |
| `@`-mention file autocomplete | Large repository performance |
| Startup macOS | ~60ms faster (parallel keychain reads) |
| `--resume` large sessions | 45% faster, 100-150 MB less peak memory |
| `/resume` all-projects | Parallel session loading |

---

## Documentation References

- **Full docs**: https://code.claude.com/docs/llms.txt
- **Tools reference**: https://code.claude.com/docs/en/tools-reference
- **GitHub changelog**: https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md
- Check installed version: `claude --version`

Excellent! I've compiled a comprehensive list of recently added Claude Code features. Here's what's new, organized by category:

## **COMPREHENSIVE CLAUDE CODE RECENT FEATURES (v2.1.83â€“v2.1.112)**

### **Major New Capabilities**

**Auto Mode (Research Preview)** - v2.1.83+
- Automatic permission classifier that approves safe actions without prompts and blocks risky ones
- Middle ground between manual approval and `--dangerously-skip-permissions`
- Enable with: `--auto-mode` or set `defaultMode: "auto"` in settings.json
- Set `PermissionDenied` hook to retry: `{retry: true}`

**Computer Use** - v2.1.86+
- Claude can open native apps, click UI, navigate screen
- Available in CLI (research preview) and Desktop app
- Enable with: `CLAUDE_CODE_ENABLE_COMPUTER_USE=1`
- Best for GUI verification tasks

---

### **Effort Levels & Performance**

**Claude Opus 4.7 xhigh** - v2.1.111+
- New effort level between `high` and `max`
- Interactive slider: `/effort` (navigate with arrow keys, confirm with Enter)
- Auto mode available for Max subscribers with Opus 4.7
- Reset to default: `/effort auto`

---

### **New Slash Commands**

| Command | Purpose |
|---------|---------|
| `/ultrareview` | Cloud-based comprehensive code review with multi-agent analysis |
| `/ultrareview <PR#>` | Review specific GitHub PR |
| `/effort` | Interactive slider for effort level selection |
| `/tui` | Switch to flicker-free fullscreen rendering |
| `/tui fullscreen` | Explicitly enable fullscreen |
| `/focus` | Toggle focus view (show only final response) |
| `/less-permission-prompts` | Scan transcripts and auto-generate bash/MCP allowlist |
| `/powerup` | Interactive feature lessons with demos |
| `/team-onboarding` | Generate teammate ramp-up guide |
| `/ultraplan` | Draft plans in cloud, review in web editor, run remotely |
| `/loop [interval]` | Run prompt on recurring interval; self-paces if interval omitted |
| `/schedule` | Create/update/list/run scheduled remote agents (cron) |
| `/autofix-pr` | Enable PR auto-fix from terminal |
| `/monitor` | Stream background events into conversation |
| `/copy N` | Copy Nth-latest response |
| `/undo` | Alias for `/rewind` |
| `/recap` | Manually invoke recap feature |
| `/color` | Set session prompt-bar color |
| `/btw` | Side question during response |

---

### **New Settings & Configuration Options**

**Settings.json New Fields:**
```json
{
  "showThinkingSummaries": true,        // enable thinking summaries (off by default)
  "disableSkillShellExecution": true,   // disable skill script execution
  "autoMemoryDirectory": "/path/to/memory",
  "autoScrollEnabled": false,           // disable auto-scroll in fullscreen
  "showClearContextOnPlanAccept": false,
  "feedbackSurveyRate": 0.1,           // enterprise admins
  "refreshInterval": 30,                // status line re-run interval (seconds)
  "modelOverrides": {
    "Opus": "arn:aws:bedrock:..."      // custom model mappings
  },
  "worktree": {
    "sparsePaths": ["packages/web", "packages/cli"]  // sparse checkout
  },
  "sandbox": {
    "failIfUnavailable": true,
    "network.allowMachLookup": true,    // macOS
    "filesystem.allowRead": ["/allowed/path"],
    "filesystem.allowWrite": ["/absolute/path"]
  },
  "hooks": {
    "eventName": {
      "if": "Bash(git *)",              // conditional hook execution
      "...": "..."
    }
  },
  "disableDeepLinkRegistration": true,
  "defaultMode": "auto"                 // enable auto mode by default
}
```

---

### **New Environment Variables**

```bash
# Prompt Caching (Critical for Windows 11 users)
ENABLE_PROMPT_CACHING_1H=1                    # 1-hour cache TTL
FORCE_PROMPT_CACHING_5M=1                     # force 5-min cache

# Rendering & Performance
CLAUDE_CODE_NO_FLICKER=1                      # flicker-free alt-screen with virtualized scrollback
CLAUDE_CODE_ENABLE_COMPUTER_USE=1             # enable computer use
CLAUDE_CODE_USE_POWERSHELL_TOOL=1             # enable PowerShell tool (Windows)

# Logging & Debugging
OTEL_LOG_RAW_API_BODIES=1                     # emit full API request/response bodies
CLAUDE_CODE_ENABLE_AWAY_SUMMARY=0             # disable recap feature
CLAUDE_STREAM_IDLE_TIMEOUT_MS=<ms>            # default 90000 (90s)

# MCP & Plugins
CLAUDE_CODE_USE_MANTLE=1                      # Bedrock powered by Mantle
CLAUDE_CODE_PLUGIN_KEEP_MARKETPLACE_ON_FAILURE=1
CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_CRON=1                    # disable scheduled agents
MCP_CONNECTION_NONBLOCKING=true               # `-p` mode: skip MCP wait

# Security & Performance
CLAUDE_CODE_SUBPROCESS_ENV_SCRUB=1            # strip credentials from subprocesses
CLAUDE_CODE_PERFORCE_MODE=1                   # `p4 edit` hint on read-only files
CLAUDE_CODE_SKIP_BEDROCK_AUTH=1
CLAUDE_CODE_SESSIONEND_HOOKS_TIMEOUT_MS=<ms> # session end hook timeout
```

---

### **New Hooks & Events**

**New Hook Types:**
| Hook | Trigger | Usage |
|------|---------|-------|
| `TaskCreated` | Task created via `TaskCreate` | Block with exit code 2 or `{decision: "block"}` |
| `PreCompact` | Before conversation compaction | Block compaction |
| `PostCompact` | After compaction completes | Reactive tasks |
| `CwdChanged` | Working directory changes | Reactive environment (direnv) |
| `FileChanged` | Tracked file modified | - |
| `PermissionDenied` | Auto mode classifier denial | Return `{retry: true}` to retry |
| `Elicitation` / `ElicitationResult` | MCP elicitation mid-task | Intercept structured input |
| `StopFailure` | Turn ends due to API error | Fire on rate limit, auth failure |
| `WorktreeCreate` (HTTP type) | Return via `hookSpecificOutput.worktreePath` |

**Conditional Hook Execution (NEW):**
```json
{
  "hooks": {
    "PreToolUse": {
      "if": "Bash(git *)",              // only runs for git commands
      "script": "..."
    }
  }
}
```

---

### **Bash Tool Enhancements**

**Auto-Allow Additions:**
- Read-only commands with **glob patterns**: `ls *.ts`, `find . -name "*.json"` (no prompts)
- Commands starting with **`cd <project-dir> &&`** skip permission prompts
- Safe environment variable prefixes: `LANG=C`, `NO_COLOR=1`, `timeout 5`
- **New tools auto-allowed**: `lsof`, `pgrep`, `tput`, `ss`, `fd`, `fdfind`

**Key Binding Changes:**
- `Ctrl+U` clears entire input buffer
- `Ctrl+Y` restores cleared buffer
- `Ctrl+L` forces full screen redraw
- `Ctrl+X Ctrl+K` stops all background agents (was `Ctrl+F`)

---

### **MCP Server Enhancements**

- **MCP Elicitation** - Servers request structured input mid-task via interactive dialogs
- **Protected Resource Metadata** (RFC 9728) - OAuth discovery for authorization servers
- **Large Result Persistence** - `_meta["anthropic/maxResultSizeChars"]` up to 500KB
- **Monitor Tool** - Stream events from background scripts live into conversation
- **Step-up Authorization** - Servers request elevated scopes via `403 insufficient_scope`
- **Connection Environment Vars**: `CLAUDE_CODE_MCP_SERVER_NAME`, `CLAUDE_CODE_MCP_SERVER_URL`
- **Plugin Binaries** - Plugins can ship executables under `bin/` for Bash invocation

---

### **IDE Integration Updates**

**VS Code / VSCode Extensions:**
- **Session Auto-Titling** - AI-generated titles within seconds of first message
- **`/remote-control`** - Bridge session to claude.ai/code (web/mobile continuation)
- **Rate Limit Banner** - Shows usage % and reset time
- **Improved Sidebar** - Session history loads correctly on reopen
- **`Esc` Twice** - Open keyboard-navigable rewind picker
- **Thinking Pill** - Shows "Thought for Ns" after response
- **Faster Cold-Open** - Reduced subprocess work

**CLI Deep Links:**
- `claude-cli://open?q=<query>` supports up to 5,000 characters
- Newlines: `%0A` encoded newlines no longer rejected
- Terminal-aware: Opens in preferred terminal

---

### **Opt-In Features (Beta)**

**Flicker-Free Rendering:**
```bash
CLAUDE_CODE_NO_FLICKER=1  # alt-screen virtualized scrollback
```
- Focus view toggle (`Ctrl+O`): prompt + one-line tool summary + final response
- Optimized for fullscreen mode

**Extended Thinking (Enhanced):**
- Rotating progress hint during extended thinking
- Thinking summaries disabled by default (opt-in: `showThinkingSummaries: true`)
- Adaptive thinking error handling

---

### **Breaking Changes (Update Required)**

| Change | Old | New |
|--------|-----|-----|
| Effort levels | `low`, `medium`, `high`, `max` | `low`, `medium`, `high` + Opus 4.7 `xhigh` |
| Stop all agents | `Ctrl+F` | `Ctrl+X Ctrl+K` |
| `/vim` toggle | Via `/vim` command | Via `/config` â†’ Editor mode |
| Settings validation | Silent on `cleanupPeriodDays: 0` | **Error thrown** |
| Windows managed settings | `C:\ProgramData\ClaudeCode\managed-settings.json` | **Removed fallback** |
| Line-by-line streaming | Enabled on Windows/WSL | **Disabled** (rendering issues) |

---

### **Windows 11 Specific Optimizations**

- **PowerShell Tool** - Native Windows tool with progressive rollout; opt in: `CLAUDE_CODE_USE_POWERSHELL_TOOL=1`
- **Flicker-Free Rendering** - Windows alt-screen now supports virtualized scrollback
- **Bash Improvements** - Backslash-escaped flags no longer bypass auto-allow
- **Deep Link Handling** - Terminal-aware opening in your preferred Windows terminal

---

### **Performance Improvements**

| Optimization | Impact |
|--------------|--------|
| Write tool diff | 60% faster on large files |
| Bash parsing | Native module (faster init, no memory leak) |
| SSE transport | Large frames now linear (was quadratic) |
| Bundle size reduction | ~510 KB |
| `--resume` large sessions | 45% faster, 100-150 MB less peak memory |
| Startup (macOS) | ~60ms faster |

---

## **For You on Windows 11**

Given your setup, I recommend configuring:

1. **Enable flicker-free rendering:**
   ```bash
   CLAUDE_CODE_NO_FLICKER=1
   ```

2. **Enable PowerShell tool (native Windows):**
   ```bash
   CLAUDE_CODE_USE_POWERSHELL_TOOL=1
   ```

3. **Enable prompt caching for faster responses:**
   ```bash
   ENABLE_PROMPT_CACHING_1H=1
   ```

4. **Auto mode (skip permission prompts for safe actions):**
   In `settings.json`:
   ```json
   {
     "permissions": {
       "defaultMode": "auto"
     }
   }
   ```

5. **Add the `/less-permission-prompts` skill** to auto-generate allowlist (you already have it!):
   ```bash
   /less-permission-prompts
   ```

---

**To check your exact Claude Code version:**
```bash
claude --version
```

**Full documentation:**
- [Claude Code docs](https://code.claude.com/docs/llms.txt)
- [GitHub Changelog](https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md)
- [What's New (Weekly Digest)](https://code.claude.com/docs/en/whats-new)

---

Sources:
- [Claude Code Changelog](https://code.claude.com/docs/en/changelog.md)
- [What's New - Claude Code Docs](https://code.claude.com/docs/en/whats-new)
- [GitHub claude-code Releases](https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/releases)
- [Claude Code Changelog on GitHub](https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md)
